name: The Reluctant Boss
effect: Accept ownership of a dangerous thing without requesting it. This card is considered accountable.

clauses.name: ESCALATION PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If a decision reaches this card: The decision is returned to the team as an action item.

clauses.name: VISIBILITY CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If this card is observed in a meeting: It is considered engaged.

clauses.name: ATTRITION EFFECT
clauses.rule: After three consecutive quarters: This card exits the role citing personal growth.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Does anyone report to this person willingly?
